title: QAスペシャリスト / LINEアプリ
description:
ポジション概要
   

  

 日本最大級のテックカンパニーであるLINEヤフー株式会社の「LINE」QAチームでは、 iOS・Android向け「LINE」の品質を支える経験豊富なQAスペシャリストを募集しています。 テスト設計・実行、不具合分析、プロセス改善を通じてプロダクトの信頼性・性能・ユーザー体験を保証し、 AI技術やテスト自動化の適用によって、品質と生産性のさらなる向上に貢献していただきます。
   

  

 主な業務内容
   

  

* 「LINE」のQA業務
* テストチームマネジメント
* プロダクト全体に向けたQAポジションからの業務改善提案


 具体的には以下の業務を想定しています。
   

  

* 「LINE」サービスにおけるテスト計画・テストケースの設計および実行
* 不具合の分析・報告を行い、開発・PMチームと協働して品質改善を推進
* テストプロセス、ワークフロー、ツールの最適化によるQAプロセスの改善
* 市場・ユーザーからのフィードバックを分析し、潜在的な品質リスクを早期に特定
* QA業務へのAI・自動化ソリューションの検証および実装
* 開発・PM・デザイン・CS・テスト自動化チームなど多職能チームとの連携


 ※変更の範囲：会社の定める全ての業務への配置転換の可能性あり
   

  

 プロダクトを知る
   

  

 LINE
   

  

 会話を楽しめる「トーク・音声通話・ビデオ通話」をはじめ、人や情報・ サービス、企業・ブランドとシームレスに繋がることができるコミュニケーションアプリです。
   

  

 組織や人を知る
   

  

* 暮らしを支えるプラットフォーム「LINE」を「止めずに進化させる」。400名超のグローバル組織を導く慧眼
   

  

  

  

 求める人物像
   

  

	+ QAの枠を超えて、「より良い開発のあり方」「より良いユーザー体験」を考え、チーム全体の品質文化をリードできる方
	+ 現状のプロセスや手法にとらわれず、課題を自ら発見し、AIや自動化などの新しい技術を積極的に取り入れて改善を推進できる方
	+ チームやプロジェクトをまたいで、開発・PM・CSなど多職能メンバーと円滑に連携し、品質を軸にした議論・提案ができる方
	+ 不具合の原因分析やテストプロセス改善を通じて、継続的にサービス全体の品質向上に貢献できる方
	+ 品質保証を単なるテスト作業としてではなく、ユーザー体験を守るためのエンジニアリング活動として捉えられる方
	+ 関連するすべてのステークホルダーと積極的にコミュニケーションを取り、問題解決に向けた調整力を持つ方
	+ 常にアンテナを張り、自ら進んでテスト業務や問題解決の活動を粘り強く進められる方
 必要な経験/スキル
   

  

	+ モバイルアプリ（iOS・Android）またはWebアプリのQA業務における実務経験（5年以上）
	+ ソフトウェアテストの基本原則、不具合管理、品質指標に関する深い理解
	+ JIRAやTestRailなどの課題管理・テスト管理ツールの使用経験
	+ QA関連の英語ドキュメントを読解・作成できる基本的な英語力
 あると望ましい経験/スキル
   

  

	+ QA活動におけるAIまたは機械学習の活用経験
	+ テスト自動化やプログラミング（Python, Java, Kotlin, Swiftなど）の経験
	+ Confluence, GitHub, Xcode, Android Studioなどの使用経験
	+ 分析的思考と品質改善への主体的な取り組み姿勢
 報酬
   

  

 想定年収：800万円～1,200万円
   

  

 賃金形態：月給制（固定残業代含む）
   

  

 基準給与：534,000円～801,000円
   

  

 （基準給与の内訳）
   

  

 ―基礎給与 ：414,000円～622,000円
   

  

 ―固定時間外手当：119,000円～179,000円
   

  

 ※時間外労働の有無に関わらず、35時間分の固定時間外手当を支給
   

  

 ※固定時間の超過分は、超過勤務手当を別途支給
   

  

 ※月給の各項目名はグレードにより異なります
   

  

 賞与：年2回を上限に、会社や所属部署の業績を踏まえて支給
   

  

 諸手当
   

  

 時間外手当、通勤手当 ※1、LINEヤフー Working Style手当 ※2、など
   

  

 ※1所属オフィスに出社した日数に応じて実費を支給。月額上限150,000円。
   

  

 ※2リモートワークにおいて働く環境を整備するための手当。月額11,000円。
   

  

 雇用形態・雇用期間
   

  

 正社員（雇用期間の定めなし、3ヶ月の試用期間あり）
   

  

 ※試用期間中の労働条件変更なし
   

  

 勤務地
   

  

 赤坂オフィス（東京都港区赤坂2\\-17\\-22 赤坂トラストタワー）
   

  

 ※出社する際のオフィスは雇入れ直後は配属拠点となります。その後は会社の定めるすべての事業所に配置転換の可能性があります。
   

  

 ※車いすの方でも勤務が可能なオフィスです。
   

  

 ※受動喫煙対策の状況：屋内禁煙
   

  

 就業時間
   

  

	+ フレックスタイム制：標準労働時間7時間45分（コアタイムなし）
	
		- 始業および終業の時刻は個人に委ねます。 但し、標準時間として始業時刻は9:30、終業時刻は18:15となります。+ 育児・介護による時短勤務制度あり。
 ※部署により通常勤務（9:30〜18:15）、シフト勤務あり。
   

  

 休日・休暇
   

  

	+ 休日：完全週休2日制（土日 ※1）、国民の祝日、年末年始（12月29日から1月4日まで）
	+ 休暇：有給休暇、特別有給休暇（慶弔、マタニティ、子の看護、介護、法定伝染病など）、ハッピーフライデー ※2、サバティカル休暇制度
 ※1 部署により異なります。
   

  

 ※2 祝日が土曜日にあたった場合、前労働日を振り替え特別休日としています。
   

  

 福利厚生
   

  

 各種社会保険完備（健康保険、介護保険、厚生年金保険、雇用保険、労災保険）、選択型確定拠出年金制度、総合福祉団体定期保険、長期所得補償制度、財形貯蓄制度、株式累積投資制度、定期健康診断・人間ドック二次検査の費用補助、社内マッサージ室、サークル、懇親会費補助など
   

  

 ※制度の適用には条件があります。詳細は、福利厚生 をご確認ください。
   

  

 人材育成・支援制度
   

  

 社員向け研修制度、語学研修、マネジメント研修、LINEヤフー Job Challenge、サバティカル休暇、社会人ドクター進学支援など
   

  

 ※制度の適用には条件があります。詳細は、人材育成・支援制度 をご確認ください。
   

  

 選考プロセス
   

  

	+ Step1
 書類選考
   

  

	+ Step2
 課題選考/適性検査
   

  

	+ Step3
 面接（複数回）/コンプライアンスチェック・リファレンスチェック
   

  

	+ Step4
 内定
   

  

 ※ただし、ポジションにより選考内容が変更となる可能性があります。
   

  

 応募
   

  

 応募フォームに必要事項をご入力のうえご応募ください。採用の適否を判断するために必要な個人情報を入力していただきます。これらは採用以外の目的には一切使用しません。なお、ご提出いただいた履歴書などは返却いたしません。あらかじめご了承ください。
   

  

 書類選考
   

  

 選考結果は合否にかかわらず2週間以内に、応募フォームに入力されたメールアドレスにご連絡いたします。ゴールデンウィークや年末年始等を挟む場合は、さらに1週間程度を要する場合があります。
   

  

 面接、適性検査、技術試験、コンプライアンスチェック・リファレンスチェック
   

  

 書類選考に合格された方には、ポジションにより実施内容が異なりますが、複数回の面接と適性検査/技術試験、コンプライアンスチェック・リファレンスチェックを実施いたします。
   

  

 選考結果は合否にかかわらず2週間以内に、応募フォームに入力されたメールアドレスにご連絡いたします。
   

  

 面接などのスケジュールによって変わりますが、順調に進んだ場合、応募から1カ月〜1カ月半程度で内定となります。なお、選考の内容や基準、結果の理由に関してのお問い合わせには、合否にかかわらず回答いたしかねます

title: Senior Software Engineer- (React & Next.JS )
description:
BOLD is looking for a Software Engineer to work on a new project that merges recruitment with advertising technology. Working with product management, collaborating with world\\-wide development squads in an agile environment, you will work on features that have an impact on job seekers, recruiters, and employers to match the right candidate to the right job. We are modernising our platform and services to simplify the process of finding the right candidate for the right job. We want it to be a rewarding experience for all involved.
   

  

**Job Description**
**ABOUT THIS TEAM**
 BOLD Platform services team design, creates, manage and maintains the highly scalable and distributed services for the wider use of web and mobile product applications/portals/websites. The current list of services is based on Microservices architecture whose domain ranges from visitor tracking, User profiles, authentication, content and payments.
   

  

 Platform team uses state of the art modern technologies like .Net framework, Python, Java, SQL Server, My SQL, Graph DB, SOLR, and a lot of other tools \\& technologies serving millions of users with hundreds of million transactions everyday through a scalable and fault tolerant architecture.
   

  

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
* Develop and maintain scalable front\\-end applications using TypeScript, React, and Next.js.
* Implement SSR/SSG, routing, and data\\-fetching strategies for optimized performance.
* Design and manage SCSS/CSS architecture to ensure responsive and maintainable styling.
* Write and maintain unit tests with Jest and React Testing Library to ensure code quality.
* Integrate front\\-end applications with RESTful APIs securely and efficiently.
* Collaborate with backend and DevOps teams to support CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Spinnaker).
* Use Git for version control, code reviews, and collaborative development.
* Continuously monitor, debug, and optimize applications for speed and performance


**WHAT YOU’LL NEED**
* Strong TypeScript (proficiency with modern ES features)
* React \\& Next.js (including SSR/SSG, routing, data fetching, and performance optimization)
* SCSS / CSS architecture (scalable styling patterns and responsive design)
* Unit Testing (Jest and React Testing Library)
* Experience integrating with RESTful APIs
* Experience with CI/CD (ideally Jenkins and Spinnaker)
* Git


**EXPERIENCE\\-**
* Senior Software Engineer\\- 4\\.5 years\\+


**BENEFITS**
**Outstanding Compensation**
* Competitive salary
* Tax\\-friendly compensation structure
* Bi\\-annual bonus
* Annual Appraisal
* Equity in company


**100% Full Health Benefits**
* Group Mediclaim, personal accident, \\& term life insurance
* Group Mediclaim benefit (including parents' coverage)
* Online Health (OPD) Consultation Benefit
* Personal accident and term life insurance coverage


**Flexible Time Away**
* 24 days paid leaves
* Declared fixed holidays
* Paternity and maternity leave
* Compassionate and marriage leave
* Covid leave (up to 7 days)


**ADDITIONAL BENEFITS**
* Internet and home office reimbursement
* In\\-office catered lunch, meals, and snacks
* Certification policy
* Cab pick\\-up and drop\\-off facility


**About BOLD**
**We Transform Work Lives**
 As an established global organization, BOLD helps people find jobs. Our story is one of growth, success, and professional fulfillment.  Education

 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in\\-office and/or in\\-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. We own the software that enables Amazon delivery drivers worldwide to check\\-in at an Amazon warehouse , get work/routes assigned and enables the pickup of hundreds of thousands of packages on a daily basis. We focus on building highly scalable, mission critical systems that power these experiences; as well as the mobile application workflows that enable the experience; and innovate with interesting technologies along the way.
   

  

 Our mobile application works in concert with our advanced logistics systems and technology. These technologies allow delivery partners to onboard, schedule delivery times in advance or on\\-demand, and be guided through their deliveries with in\\-app mapping, navigation, and much more. Our ability to engage with, support and provide a world\\-class experience to both customers and our delivery partners has become more critical as we continue to expand the number of active delivery partners and target faster deliveries to our customers.
   

  

 Being part of a customer obsessed company and working as part of this team, you’ll be responsible for the design, development, test, and deployment of a range of products that make it possible to deliver packages to customers in two hours or less all over the world. You will have an opportunity to conceptualize, design, build, test and own software systems. You will influence the technical direction of the team, work with many different technologies. If you are a software engineer with a creative flare, problem\\-solving skills, exposure to various back\\-end technologies and have the desire to help drive Amazon's next generation of delivery, we want to talk with you.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 A Sr. engineer in the UTRX organization is a technical leader that drives the execution of programs within the organization, sets the technical bar and works with other engineers to delivery roadmaps. Sr. SDEs in the UTRX organization are familiar with Last Mile core systems and influence software architecture decisions across teams and organization. They closely collaborate with mobile engineers and UX designers in defining mobile experiences that delight Amazon delivery drivers.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**

* 5\\+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience
* 5\\+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience

**Preferred Qualifications**

title: Investigation Specialist, Rabbit App Bug Triage - Voice Of Driver
description:
**Description**
 We are RABT VOD (Voice of Drivers) team which is one of the most important and integral part of WW Amazon Flex team with a vision to improve the experience of Delivery Partners (DPs) and make their journey friction\\-less. VOD team is looking for a creative, analytical, dynamic and experienced Investigation Specialist to join us and help improve DP experience. A successful investigation specialist must be able passionate about to understanding driver pain points, has unending desirThe Rabbit App Bug Triage (RABT) – Voice of Driver (VOD) team is a critical component of the Worldwide Amazon Flex ecosystem, focused on improving the experience of Delivery Partners (DPs) by identifying and resolving defects impacting the Rabbit App and delivery workflows.
   

  

 We are seeking a detail\\-oriented and analytical Investigation Specialist who is passionate about understanding driver pain points and uncovering root causes of defects impacting the DP experience. The ideal candidate demonstrates strong problem\\-solving ability, technical curiosity, and the ability to navigate ambiguity while working across multiple data sources and stakeholder teams.
   

  

 This role requires a combination of technical investigation, data analysis, and operational excellence to identify emerging defects, validate issues through log analysis and app reproduction, and provide actionable insights to partner teams. The successful candidate will be comfortable working with SQL, Excel, and operational tools, while maintaining a high bar for quality, productivity, and customer obsession.e to uncover root causes of any defect, work independently, be comfortable with ambiguity, and be able to influence internal/external partners at all levels of the organization. This role will particularly suit someone with strong technical skills, analytical bent of mind, intermediate to advanced expertise in MS Excel, MS Word, SQL etc.., strong communication skills both written and verbal, relationship building skills and excellent Customer Obsession.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Driver Issue Investigation \\- Analyze Delivery Partner (DP) reported issues by reviewing data from multiple listening channels including station feedback forms, support tickets, and social media signals.
* Log Analysis and Root Cause Identification \\- Perform detailed log analysis and data investigation to identify root causes, validate defects, and assess potential impact on the DP experience.
* App Bug Reproduction \\- Reproduce reported app issues using technical debugging and testing methods to confirm defects and provide actionable insights to engineering teams.
* Insight Generation from Listening Channels \\- Act as a primary point of contact for extracting insights from multiple Voice of Driver channels to identify emerging trends, systemic defects, and operational risks.
* Operational Excellence \\- Meet established productivity, quality, and SLA targets while maintaining a high standard of investigation accuracy.
* Workflow and Documentation Management \\- Maintain accurate documentation of investigations, update workflow trackers, and ensure proper record\\-keeping of daily operational tasks.
* Process Improvement \\- Identify opportunities to improve investigation processes, defect detection mechanisms, and triage workflows.
* Stakeholder Communication and Escalation\\- Proactively raise risks, trends, or systemic issues to managers and partner teams and support high\\-visibility investigations when required.


**About The Team**
 The Rabbit App Bug Triage (RABT) team operates within the Worldwide Flex Voice of Driver (VOD) organization and plays a critical role in improving the experience of Amazon Flex Delivery Partners (DPs). The team acts as a centralized investigation function that captures, analyzes, and triages driver\\-reported issues related to the Rabbit App and delivery workflows across multiple marketplaces.
   

  

 RABT consolidates signals from diverse listening channels including Support tickets, station feedback, and social media, enabling the team to identify emerging defects, validate driver\\-reported issues, and escalate actionable insights to partner tech teams. Through structured investigation, log analysis, and app issue reproduction, the team helps eliminate noise, improve defect detection, and accelerate resolution timelines.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in a quantitative/technical field such as computer science, engineering, statistics
* Experience with Excel
* Experience with SQL


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience troubleshooting and documenting findings, or experience troubleshooting and debugging technical systems

title: IC 5 Product Engineer
description:
**Company Description**
 Wise is a global technology company, building the best way to move and manage the world’s money.
   

  

**Min fees. Max ease. Full speed.**
 Whether people and businesses are sending money to another country, spending abroad, or making and receiving international payments, Wise is on a mission to make their lives easier and save them money.
   

  

 As part of our team, you will be helping us create an entirely new network for the world's money.
   

  

**For everyone, everywhere.**
**Job Description**
 More about
 **our mission** 
 and
 **what we offer** 
 .
   

  

 At Wise, we’re on a mission to make money borderless, instant, and convenient for millions of people and businesses worldwide. Our engineers are at the heart of this mission, solving complex challenges and building seamless, secure solutions that customers love.
   

  

 We're looking for an IC 5 Product Engineer to join our APAC (Asia Pacific) organisation, in the Hyderabad office
   

  

 APAC customers are a strong contributor to the Wise's growth. With one of the most diverse money movement corridors, multiple markets with different regulations to send, receive, hold and spend, it is essential to scale this organisation tech first. Hyderabad is a new full stack hub and being a senior pioneering engineer helps set the base on which the engineering organization in the location will be built. If this sounds exciting to you then you are in the right place.
   

  

**Here’s how you’ll be contributing to the organization:**
* Design and lead implementation of scalable, customer centric solutions tailored to the diverse APAC markets, reducing redundancies and improving the lead time to expand to more markets.
* Identify, build and maintain automations that mindfully leverage LLMs across APAC and regional markets to improve speed and efficiency.
* Own evolution of product observability stack to identify gaps, and unlock new opportunities for growth and operational excellence.
* Collaborate with various stakeholders throughout Wise, plan roadmaps with your team, and work through challenges to determine scope and realistic delivery.
* Be responsible for the technical health of APAC regional expansion organization through accountability, ownership and mentorship.
* Develop a strong technical opinion on the design of regional solutions and be involved in feedback for design and ADRs for the APAC and regional expansion.


**Qualifications**
**A bit about you!**
* You have solid Java 17 plus knowledge and experience with Spring framework and microservice architecture with at least 10\\+ years of work experience
* You have experience working with relational and non\\-relational databases, query optimisation and schema design
* You approach challenges with a strong product mindset, prioritise customer needs and make data\\-driven decisions to fix customer pain\\-points
* You have led the design and development of complex engineering solutions and understand their broader impact on business outcomes
* You have excellent communication skills and can articulate complex, technical concepts to non\\-technical audiences.
* You provide technical guidance and mentorship to senior and experienced developers.
* You have web development experience with one of JavaScript frameworks like React, Angular, or other
* You have experience in technical leadership \\- maintain technical excellence beyond your team, managing performance, giving feedback, and coaching engineers to thrive.
* You are familiar with Continuous Integration and deployment frameworks


 …but don’t worry we don’t expect you to know everything!
   

  

**Some Extra Skills And Experiences That Would Be Great**
* You have experience with financial systems including how payments, digital onboarding flows and payment schemes work.
* You have some Groovy experience.
* Worked with external and regulatory stakeholders.


 Additional Information
   

  

**What You Can Expect As An Engineer At Wise**
 We don't measure seniority by years of experience, but by the impact you create and the complexity of problems you can help solve. As a Senior Staff/Staff software Engineer at Wise, you would be given the licence to:
   

  

* Lead large or multi\\-quarter (16\\+ engineering weeks) sized projects that have a meaningful impact on Wise product and customers that involve multiple teams/squads/tribes.
* Own the technical domain of your org with a view on how it should move forward. Take the opinions and work with other teams to execute.
* Propose ideas to improve and grow your team’s product.
* Embrace long\\-term ownership of ideas/opinions/projects while training other engineers to reduce single points of failure.
* Architect and design solutions that allow for iterative delivery and future scaling.
* Collaborate closely across internal functions like banking, product, analytics, design, and operations to ensure smooth and effective delivery.
* Collaborate with external stakeholders like regulators and payment schemes to build strong credibility about Wise Engineering.
* Level up the technical organization by presenting your opinions about cutting\\-edge technologies both internally and externally.
* Be a bar raiser in the engineering interview process to hire for strong engineering talent.


**To get the best view of what we expect at all levels of our engineering team, you can take a look at our Engineering Career Map**
 For everyone, everywhere. We're people building money without borders — without judgement or prejudice, too. We believe teams are strongest when they are diverse, equitable and inclusive.
   

  

 We're proud to have a truly international team, and we celebrate our differences.
   

  

 Inclusive teams help us live our values and make sure every Wiser feels respected, empowered to contribute towards our mission and able to progress in their careers.
   

  

 If you want to find out more about what it's like to work at Wise visit Wise.Jobs.
   

  

 Keep up to date with life at Wise by following us on LinkedIn and Instagram.

title: Quality Engineer-Test Management.SAP
description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long\\-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Quality Engineer specializing in Test Management for SAP, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the quality of applications and systems implemented using SAP. Your focus will be on developing test scenarios and test cases, executing them to verify that the system meets the requirements, with a primary emphasis on functional testing. Your primary responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Develop Test Scenarios and Cases: Create comprehensive test scenarios and test cases to ensure thorough coverage of system functionality, identifying potential issues before they impact users.
* Execute Test Cases: Run developed test cases to verify that the system is built according to the specified requirements, meticulously documenting outcomes and any discrepancies found.
* Verify System Requirements: Confirm that the system adheres to the established requirements through rigorous testing, focusing on functional aspects to guarantee compliance and quality.
* Identify and Report Defects: Detect defects and inconsistencies during testing, reporting them promptly to facilitate timely corrections and improvements.
* Ensure Functional Quality: Concentrate on the functional testing of applications, ensuring they operate as intended and meet the necessary standards.


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* SAP Testing Experience: Experience with testing applications and systems implemented using SAP, including developing test scenarios and test cases to verify system functionality.
* Functional Testing Knowledge: Experience in functional testing of applications, with a focus on verifying system requirements and identifying potential issues.
* Test Case Development: Experience with creating comprehensive test scenarios and test cases to ensure thorough coverage of system functionality.
* Test Execution and Analysis: Experience in executing test cases, documenting outcomes, and analyzing results to identify defects and inconsistencies.
* Quality Assurance Understanding: Experience with ensuring functional quality of applications, confirming system adherence to established requirements through rigorous testing.


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* SAP Testing Tools Knowledge: Experience with various SAP testing tools and methodologies would be beneficial for this role, enabling more efficient test case development and execution.
* Automated Testing Exposure: Exposure to automated testing techniques and tools in an SAP environment would be advantageous, allowing for more comprehensive testing coverage and faster defect identification.
* Agile Methodologies Familiarity: Familiarity with agile development methodologies would be valuable, facilitating collaboration with development teams and ensuring testing aligns with iterative development cycles.
